mapper.select: SELECT v.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name as ureal_name, u.phone as uphone FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN user u ON v.owner_id = u.id WHERE v.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM vehicle WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT v.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name as ureal_name, u.phone as uphone FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN user u ON v.owner_id = u.id ORDER BY v.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle(vehicle_no, owner_id, plate_number, model, purchase_date, vin, maintenance_cycle, last_maintenance, create_time) VALUES(#{vehicleNo}, #{ownerId}, #{plateNumber}, #{model}, #{purchaseDate}, #{vin}, #{maintenanceCycle}, #{lastMaintenance}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicle SET plate_number = #{plateNumber}, model = #{model}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, vin = #{vin}, maintenance_cycle = #{maintenanceCycle}, last_maintenance = #{lastMaintenance} WHERE id = #{id}
